title: Karnataka CM news LIVE: Shivakumar backers resist Sidda's role proposal, new K'taka CM's oath on June 3
description: Karnataka CM news LIVE: LIVE: Congress is expected to formally elect DK Shivakumar as its leader at a Vidhana Soudha meeting at 4 pm today, after which preparations for his CM swearing-in ceremony are likely to proceed. The ceremony is expected to take place on June 3, HT has learnt.
